Supporter-Rule: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Name: Lum Berry
Description: At any time between turns, if the Pokémon this card is attached to is affected by any Special Conditions, remove all of them. Then discard Lum Berry.
Tool-Rule: Attach Lum Berry to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn’t already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

Name: Oran Berry
Description: At any time between turns, if the Pokémon this card is attached to has at least 2 damage counters on it, remove 2 damage counters from it. Then discard Oran Berry.
Tool-Rule: Attach Oran Berry to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn’t already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card.

Name: Poké Ball
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card, show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

Name: Pokémon Reversal
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent switches 1 of his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

Name: PokéNav
Description: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck, and choose a Basic Pokémon, Evolution card, or Energy card. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Put the 2 other cards back on top of your deck in any order.

Name: Professor Birch

Name: Energy Search

Name: Switch
Description: Switch 1 of your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Darkness Energy

Name: Metal Energy

Name: Rainbow Energy
